notes: Released June 1997; terminal version 8.0.6; succeeded by Oracle8i 1998
Predecessor; 7.3 was current; customers migrated to Oracle8
Successor to Oracle8; added Java VM; released September 1998
Three-tier cartridge architecture; Oracle8 was its database component
OR-DBMS paradigm; Oracle8 was major commercial implementation; PostgreSQL also implements
Oracle's procedural SQL extension; extended in Oracle8 for object support
Oracle8.1 to add Java access; became central via Oracle8i JVM
Standard referenced in NCA; distributed object standard; declined with rise of web services
Database-native messaging; still available in modern Oracle Database
